name: Chocolate Covered Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate pieces, corn syrup, and water in a double boiler over hot water.
2. Stir until melted.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanuts until well coated.
4. Drop the mixture by teaspoonfuls onto wax paper lined baking sheets.
5. Cover with aluminum foil and chill in the refrigerator until firm.
Makes about 36 pieces.
